mapper.sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.order_type, o.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, o.status, o.wave_id, v.wave_no, o.outbound_date, o.complete_date, o.total_qty, o.del_flag, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark FROM wms_outbound_order o LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON o.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id LEFT JOIN wms_wave v ON o.wave_id = v.wave_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_outbound_order (order_no, order_type, warehouse_id, status, wave_id, outbound_date, total_qty, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{warehouseId}, #{status}, #{waveId}, #{outboundDate}, #{totalQty}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE wms_outbound_order SET del_flag = '2' WHERE order_id IN #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.detail_id, d.order_id, d.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.spec_model, m.unit, d.batch_no, d.plan_qty, d.actual_qty, d.location_id, l.warehouse_code as location_code, CONCAT_WS(' / ', (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(p.warehouse_name SEPARATOR ' / ') FROM wms_warehouse p WHERE FIND_IN_SET(p.warehouse_id, REPLACE(l.ancestors, ' ', '')) AND p.warehouse_id != 0 ORDER BY FIND_IN_SET(p.warehouse_id, REPLACE(l.ancestors, ' ', ''))), l.warehouse_name ) as location_name, d.pick_qty, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, d.remark FROM wms_outbound_order_detail d LEFT JOIN wms_material m ON d.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse l ON d.location_id = l.warehouse_id WHERE d.order_id = #{orderId} AND d.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_outbound_order_detail (order_id, material_id, batch_no, plan_qty, actual_qty, location_id, pick_qty, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{materialId}, #{batchNo}, #{planQty}, #{actualQty}, #{locationId}, #{pickQty}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE wms_outbound_order_detail SET del_flag = '2' WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_outbound_order SET wave_id = #{waveId}, status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: WHERE o.del_flag = '0' AND o.wave_id = #{waveId} ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_outbound_order SET wave_id = NULL, status = '0', update_time = sysdate() WHERE wave_id = #{waveId} AND del_flag = '0'
